audit_items.proof_trace: Both transfers are captured in local variables (assetOutAmount at L442, assetOut at L446) before any external call. EVM transaction atomicity guarantees that if safeTransferFrom (L453) reverts, safeTransfer (L444) is also reverted; bid() is only 'settled' when both complete. The reentrancy guard (s_entered, L418/L457) is set before the first external call and reset after the last, preventing re-entrant manipulation of the transfer sequence.
